meta.title: PSRA / ASA Drop Set A Final Index
meta.scope: PSRA / ASA / Execution Broker / artefact-bound build workflow.
meta.note: Drop 19 is a bridge/backlink to a future Interaction Governance set, not core canon here.

drops.label: Passive Structural Runtime Audit v1
drops.what_it_is: Full PSRA audit prompt/protocol for evidence-bound component-first artefact analysis without fixes, refactors, reconciliation, or advice.
drops.anchor: The constraints in this prompt are controls, not content. Do not merely mention them. Enforce them by excluding output that violates them.

drops.label: Cognitive Substrate Loop Audit
drops.what_it_is: Passive audit writeup of a zipped TypeScript/Node assistant cognitive substrate runtime.
drops.anchor: The architecture says “constraints become controls.” The implementation currently mostly says “constraints become model-visible context plus some substring gates.”

drops.label: API-first Audit Workflow Architecture
drops.what_it_is: Architecture note for implementing PSRA using an API-first core, MCP/tool interface, n8n orchestration wrapper, optional Custom GPT front-end, and optional multi-pass/multi-agent layers.
drops.anchor: Build the brainstem as API. Expose it through MCP. Let n8n move things around. Use Custom GPT as a comfy cockpit. Add multi-agent only where it beats single-agent plus validation.

drops.label: PSRA v1.1 Invocation Contract
drops.what_it_is: Named workflow call pattern for invoking PSRA without pasting the full prompt each time.
drops.anchor: PSRA this, component-first, as-written, no fixes.

drops.label: Dynamic PSRA Cloudflare Workflow Definition
drops.what_it_is: Architecture note for making PSRA a manifest-driven, stateful, versioned Cloudflare Workflow.
drops.anchor: Make PSRA a dynamic workflow definition, not a static mega-prompt.

drops.label: PSRA v1.1 Optimized Prompt
drops.what_it_is: Shorter, stricter PSRA v1.1 prompt with non-negotiable controls, priority order, materiality rule, fixed audit workflow, and silent self-check rejection conditions.
drops.anchor: Those two lines make the prompt behave less like a writing brief and more like a gate.

drops.label: PSRA Capability Upgrade Ladder
drops.what_it_is: Capability design note for making PSRA more intelligent through phase-specific passes, artefact graph/state, validators, materiality scoring, evidence references, capability profiles, regression memory, audit trace, and human promotion boundaries while preserving the passive audit invariant.
drops.anchor: That is how PSRA grows teeth without growing hands.

drops.label: PSRA Dynamic Workflow Codex Build Schema
drops.what_it_is: Codex-ready build contract for implementing PSRA v1.1 as a Cloudflare-hosted, manifest-driven, stateful workflow runner with API endpoints, Durable Object run state, R2, Supabase, structured phase outputs, validators, tests, security boundaries, and definition of done.
drops.anchor: Schema accepted. Debate closed. Build exactly this.

drops.label: Governed AI Build Operating Model
drops.what_it_is: Structural read of the missing middle layer between AI-use philosophy and the Cloudflare/PSRA build schema, with execution mode headers as the key missing control.

drops.label: Execution Broker Codex Boundary
drops.what_it_is: Middle Execution Broker layer between collaborative planning and Codex execution, compiling exploration into bounded implementation tickets.
drops.anchor: Codex does not receive the conversation. Codex receives the decision.

drops.label: Personal OS Temp Chat Salvage Pack
drops.what_it_is: Carry-forward salvage summary of useful artefacts from a temp chat.
drops.anchor: Build systems where your decisions become operational state, not conversational suggestions.

drops.label: Artefact-Bound Operational State
drops.what_it_is: Operating principle for externalizing decisions, constraints, execution scope, audit results, accepted schemas, runtime capability, and open ambiguity into artefacts.
drops.anchor: Anything the system must not distort should be externalized into an artefact before it becomes actionable.

drops.label: ASA v0.1 Actual State Audit
drops.family: ASA / PSRA / Personal OS audit layer
drops.what_it_is: Sibling workflow to PSRA for producing an evidence-bound snapshot of actual system, repo, infrastructure, service, deployment, automation, and loose-component state.
drops.anchor: Before fixing the system, produce an artefact the system can be held to.

drops.label: ASA Codex Implementation Path
drops.what_it_is: Implementation plan for ASA that keeps Codex in the execution layer only while ChatGPT/Claude handle audit interpretation and user approval remains the control point.
drops.anchor: Codex should build the audit machine, not decide what the messy system means.

drops.label: ASA Local-First Codex Build Path
drops.what_it_is: Local-first ASA implementation path that proposes starting with a read-only TypeScript CLI collector before later Cloudflare deployment.
drops.anchor: Schema accepted. Debate closed. Build ticket 1 only.

drops.label: ASA Deployed-First Intake Worker Build Path
drops.what_it_is: Preferred deployed-first ASA implementation path where Codex builds a Cloudflare Worker evidence intake/control surface first, with staging deploy, HTTP smoke tests, R2/Supabase storage, snapshot/report endpoints, and GitHub Action evidence sender.
drops.anchor: Build deployed ASA intake Worker. Deploy to staging. Prove it with remote smoke tests.

drops.label: ASA as JeffeOS Runtime Capability
drops.family: ASA / JeffeOS Runtime Substrate / Capability Graph
drops.what_it_is: Alternative ASA framing where ASA is registered as a read-only capability inside the existing JeffeOS runtime substrate instead of built as a standalone intake surface first.
drops.anchor: Do not build a standalone ASA system. Register ASA as a governed capability/lane in the existing graph-governed runtime.

drops.label: ASA JeffeOS Compatibility Correction
drops.family: ASA / JeffeOS Runtime Substrate / Deployed-First Implementation
drops.what_it_is: Correction to Drop 17: JeffeOS substrate should inform ASA design and prevent duplicate control-plane structures, but ASA should not necessarily be embedded immediately as a runtime capability.
drops.anchor: Build ASA deployed-first, but design it so it can later become a first-class runtime capability without duplicating JeffeOS control-plane structures.

drops.label: Stateful Constraint Installation
drops.what_it_is: Principle and derived control layer for turning recognized constraints into installed controls before rendering; belongs mainly to a future Interaction Governance set, preserved here as backlink/supporting background.
drops.anchor: The user says a constraint. The system must not merely understand it. It must install it.

duplicates.duplicate: Passive Structural Runtime Audit v1 repeat
